Colombia strong: higher rank, better attack (2.13 avg) and decent defense (1.07). DR Congo lower rank, attack 1.33, defense 0.67 (good defense). Recent form: Colombia recent matches include a 1-3 win vs Uzbekistan (but that seems odd: score 1-3 but status Win? maybe they were away and won 3-1? Actually score "1-3" maybe Colombia scored 3? ambiguous. But overall they have 8 wins, 4 draws, 3 losses in last 15. DR Congo also 8-4-3. But rank difference.

We can assign probabilities: Colombia win ~55%, draw ~25%, DR Congo win ~20%.

Predicted score: maybe 2-0 for Colombia.

Confidence: maybe 0.68.
